description_long: This town hall is a two-story masonry building with a symmetrical facade, featuring large multi-pane windows and a central entrance. The roof is steeply pitched and covered with dark shingles, punctuated by two prominent brick chimneys and a decorative weather vane. The main structure is complemented by a detached garage with a gabled roof and a stone well in the courtyard, all set within a neatly maintained grassy yard and paved walkways. The facade is adorned with classical elements such as cornices, pilasters, and subtle moldings, giving it a stately and formal appearance. The main entrance is accentuated by a small portico and a set of steps leading up to double doors. No visible signage or flags are present on the exterior.
description: A stately two-story town hall with a symmetrical facade, classical detailing, a detached garage, and a central courtyard with a stone well.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the side of the building, the detached garage, the stone well, and the grassy courtyard.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical windows, decorative facade, and the garage to the left.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view focusing on the garage, well, and the side wall of the main building with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Side elevation showing the long, unadorned wall of the building and the roofline with chimneys and weather vane.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Cornices, pilasters, window moldings, and subtle classical detailing
attribute_entrance_design: Single main entrance with double doors, small portico, steps, and decorative framing elements
